description: CompositionBlack polo t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, a half front buttoned placket and a vented hemFitRegularWash careWash separately using a mild detergentDo not bleachDrip dryWarm ironThis easy-to-wear t-shirt from spykar adds a bold brassy look to your wardrobe.
